name: DataExchange
description: Unified extension exposing Business Central data via web service APIs for external system integration. Includes dimension management via CodeUnit API (50151), sales invoice operations via CodeUnit API (50152) for invoice details/creation/dimensions, dimension queries via OData (50252 for dimension groups/codes, 50253 for dimension values filtered by group), sales invoice queries (50254 for draft invoices, 50255 for posted invoices), and comprehensive customer data via dual OData Query endpoints (50250 core fields, 50251 detailed info).
